steps.step: Install uber-go/zap and natefinch/lumberjack dependencies in cli/cjtCli
Define Log Domain models (System, Audit, Stream, DLQ)
Implement Logger factory with Zap and Lumberjack support
Configure log rotation (max size 500MB, etc.) in ~/.cjtCli/log/

task: Implement Output Interceptor and Panic Recovery

steps.step: Define Response structure for machine-friendly output
Implement JSON/YAML formatter for Cobra commands
Implement Global Panic Recover hook with JSON output
Write unit tests for logger initialization and rotation
Write unit tests for JSON/YAML response formatting
Test panic recovery and its structured output
